components.label: === 1) Code of Conduct and Professional Behavior ===
Employees are expected to maintain professionalism, respect coworkers and clients, avoid harassment/discrimination, and follow organizational values in all work-related interactions.
Acknowledged and agreed: Code of Conduct and Professional Behavior.
Employees must follow approved schedules, report attendance accurately, submit leave/absence requests properly, and meet assigned job responsibilities.
Acknowledged and agreed: Attendance, Timekeeping, and Workplace Responsibility.
Employees must protect passwords and credentials, use approved security controls, and immediately report suspected compromise, phishing, or unauthorized access.
Acknowledged and agreed: Information Security and Account Protection.
Employees must handle company and personal data responsibly, access only what is required for their role, and comply with confidentiality/privacy obligations and legal requirements.
Acknowledged and agreed: Confidentiality and Data Privacy.
Company systems, devices, network, and applications are for authorized business use. Prohibited acts include malicious activity, unauthorized software, and misuse of company resources.
Acknowledged and agreed: Acceptable Use of Company Systems.
=== 6) Remote Work, Devices, and Physical Security ===
When working remotely or using portable devices, employees must secure equipment, prevent unauthorized viewing/access, and follow device handling and reporting procedures.
Acknowledged and agreed: Remote Work, Devices, and Physical Security.
Employees must promptly report incidents, policy breaches, safety concerns, and suspected misconduct, and cooperate in internal review or investigation processes.
Acknowledged and agreed: Reporting, Investigations, and Cooperation.
Violations may result in disciplinary action up to and including termination, subject to company policy and applicable law. Policies may be updated and communicated periodically.
Acknowledged and agreed: Disciplinary Action and Policy Updates.
By signing below, I confirm that I have read this Employee Policy Agreement, had the opportunity to ask questions, and agree to comply with all applicable company policies and procedures.
I acknowledge and agree to all policy sections listed above.
I understand that this acknowledgment remains in effect during my employment unless superseded by a newer policy acknowledgment.
